headline: Lululemon Governance Battle And ShowZero Launch Shape Investor View
summary: Founder Chip Wilson has intensified a proxy fight at lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU), calling for an immediate overhaul of the Board of Directors, including declassification and new independent nominees. The company has introduced ShowZero, its first sweat concealing fabric technology for high sweat activities, developed with Ambassador and tennis player Frances Tiafoe. These events highlight parallel shifts in lululemon's corporate governance debate and product development...

headline: Lululemon Athletica May Rebound With Spring Line or Require Reset, BofA Says
summary: Lululemon Athletica (LULU) could see sales rebound with its spring launch, or a new chief executive

headline: lululemon Launches Its First-Ever Sweat-Concealing Technology For High-Sweat Activities
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, March 03, 2026--lululemon (NASDAQ: LULU) today announced the launch of its first-ever sweat-concealing technology designed for high-sweat activities. The new technology, which will live under lululemon’s ShowZero™ platform, conceals higher volumes of sweat, while ensuring enhanced breathability, moisture management, and an incredibly lightweight feel, to support the most demanding, high-sweat activities.

headline: lululemon athletica inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2025 Earnings Conference Call
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, March 03, 2026--lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) today announced that its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year fiscal 2025 will be released Tuesday, March 17, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss the financial results.

headline: Swiss sneaker maker plunges 14% on weak guidance, slower than expected 2026 growth
summary: On is entering thee third and final year of its strategy to double sales by 2026 in a quest to "be the most premium global sportswear brand."
